textBlock.$description: From contract to booking in three steps. (I5164:6567;5155:21;5155:18)

textBlock2.$description: We handle the technical complexity. Your agents just search and book. (I5164:6567;5155:21;5155:19)

textBlock4.$description: We plug into your GDS & NDC contracts. (I5164:6567;5155:29;5154:20)

textBlock5.$description: You keep your Sabre, Amadeus or Travelport agreements & we configure the platform in week one. No new contracts. No renegotiation. NDC connections added automatically. (I5164:6567;5155:29;5154:22)

textBlock9.$description: Your agents type the route once. The platform fires parallel queries to all connected GDS and NDC sources at the same millisecond. Average fare saving vs single-GDS: ~23%. (I5164:6567;5155:44;5154:33)

textBlock18.$description: Book, and analyse: one branded portal. (I5164:6567;5155:59;5154:42)

textBlock19.$description: Everything inside your white-label platform. Book fares, issue tickets, set price alerts, pull reports under your own brand. Your data in your database. No shared logins. Full ownership. (I5164:6567;5155:59;5154:44)

textBlock20.$description: Your brand. Your data. Your platform. (I5164:6567;5155:59;5154:45)

textBlock21.$description: All three steps completed within your 6-week onboarding. (I5164:6567;5155:72)
